name: Physical Mail Action Sorter
description: Sort a stressful stack of physical mail into four bins with action labels, discard/archive rules, and a simple action tracker.
author: OpenClaw Batch AC
target_user: People who feel overwhelmed by physical mail, envelopes, notices, and paper clutter.
trigger_keywords: what do I do with this mail
use_cases: Using sender clues without exposing private account details
Creating action labels for mail items
Defining discard and archive rules for paper mail
